file_name: Oshina et al. - 2022 - Three-dimensional representation of triple spectral line imaging data as an option for noncontact sk.json

did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper uses a modified Beer-Lambert law model to calculate chromophore concentrations and presents data as 3D graphs. While the discussion mentions the potential future application of AI algorithms for 3D cloud recognition, the study itself did not use AI, machine learning, or deep learning to obtain its results.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
